subject: Improve mobile layout and remove confusing Next button
body:
- Add flex-wrap to main tab navigation for mobile wrapping
- Convert wizard from step-by-step to progressive disclosure pattern
- Questions auto-advance when option selected (no Next button needed)
- Answered questions show in compact format with Change button
- Smooth scroll animation to next question after selection
- Update UI/UX documentation with new wizard behavior
title: Improve mobile layout and remove confusing Next button
